changes.summary: New P-4 shared helper: verifyOtpCodeAttempt with channel-specific message presets (SMS_OTP_ATTEMPT_MESSAGES, EMAIL_OTP_ATTEMPT_MESSAGES). Centralizes attempt counting, max-attempt guard, and verified persistence.

New BC-12 SendSmsOtpUseCase: E.164 validation, SMS enabled gate (inv-24), delegates send to SmsProviderService.sendOtp. Exports SmsAuthDisabledError, InvalidPhoneNumberError, createSendSmsOtpUseCase factory.
New BC-12 VerifySmsOtpUseCase: validates input, delegates OTP verify to SmsProviderService, authenticateSms + establishJwtSession. Exports createVerifySmsOtpUseCase factory.
New BC-12 SendEmailOtpUseCase: email required/enabled gates, delegates send to EmailProviderService.sendOtp (15m TTL preserved in provider). Exports createSendEmailOtpUseCase factory.
New BC-12 VerifyEmailOtpUseCase: validates input, delegates OTP verify to EmailProviderService, authenticateEmail + establishJwtSession. Exports createVerifyEmailOtpUseCase factory.

New BC-12 VerifyCallCheckUseCase: phone/call enabled gates, polls SmsProviderService.verifyCallStatus, on CONFIRMED runs authenticateSms + establishJwtSession. Exports createVerifyCallCheckUseCase factory.
P-4 retirement: verifyOtp now delegates attempt logic to verifyOtpCodeAttempt helper. Send/rate-limit/TTL behavior unchanged (5m OTP expiry, 60s resend cooldown, 3/hour rate limit).

notes: AuthController wiring to these use cases is outside write_set (follow-up). EmailProviderService.verifyOtp still contains duplicated attempt logic; EMAIL_OTP_ATTEMPT_MESSAGES exported for its migration. call/init remains in controller delegating to SmsProviderService.initiateCallVerification.
